name: cloud-baseline
description: Internal must-find fixture for the cloud_account asset. Run against a mock AWS account seeded with CIS-failing posture (e.g. a public S3 bucket, root access keys). prowler + scoutsuite (two posture engines → corroboration) emit FAIL findings; cloudfox (registry, scope-gated) enumerates IAM attack paths on demand. For the richer per-CIS-section recall scorecard use `tsbench cloud --target aws --ground-truth fixtures/cloud/baseline/expected-controls.csv` (scorer: internal/bench/cloud.go); this must_find list stays empty until a seeded account's exact rule_ids are pinned — a documented stub.

competitors.note: No neutral CSPM leaderboard (Prowler / Scout Suite / Wiz / Orca self-published). Reference: CIS AWS Foundations recall vs. a seeded mock account. Honest-mapping discipline (CLAUDE.md §8): only the 6 frameworks with catalogs are annotated; unmapped frameworks (FedRAMP, AWS-FSBP) are dropped, never mis-claimed.
